---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for maclisten
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is hard or slow to do today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see in maclisten.

## Why maclisten?

maclisten deliberately stays small and only wraps things that are hard from shell / Python / AppleScript. Why does this belong in maclisten rather than a script?

## Alternatives considered

Any other tools or approaches you've tried.
